raw_consumer_statement:

The purchases were made at XXXX and XXXX without my knowledge or consent. 
I did not authorize any of these transactions and immediately reported them to Citi. 
Citi acknowledged the issue and applied temporary credits while the charges were under investigation. 
Transactions under investigation include : {$1200.00} on XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX {$1200.00} on XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX {$75.00} on XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX {$970.00} on XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX {$120.00} on XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX {$650.00} on XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX Citi issued security credits on XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, and XX/XX/XXXX reflecting the disputed amounts. 
I am seeking resolution, including permanent reversal of all unauthorized charges and confirmation of my accounts security.
